name: MACSS Modernization
desc: Modernized legacy mainframe screens for the Missouri Child Support System into responsive, accessible ASP.NET Core Razor Pages integrated with REST APIs and SQL Server stored procedures. Tech: ASP.NET Core, C#, Razor Pages, REST APIs, SQL Server, JavaScript, Bootstrap, WCAG / Section 508.

name: CSI 2.0 - Surety Bond Management Platform
desc: End-to-end surety bond management SPA digitizing bond operations across Bond Search, Bond Details, Agent Management, Payments, Renewal/Billing, Inspections, Collateral, and Reports. Tech: Angular, TypeScript, NgRx, RxJS, ASP.NET Core Web API, EF Core, SQL Server, Telerik Reporting.

name: Activity Management Platform
desc: Activity and task-tracking SPA with full CRUD, built on a 5-layer architecture using Angular, Angular Material, NgRx, RxJS, ASP.NET Core Web API, Entity Framework Core, SQLite, MediatR, CQRS, and FluentValidation.
